summary.intent: Address Codex review findings on PR #669 of fogodev/ars-ui by fixing accessibility and i18n issues in the combobox component, then get the PR through another clean Codex review pass.
summary.outcome: Fixed two accessibility/i18n issues (hard-coded English live-region suffix and listbox labelled with trigger action text), added regression tests, committed the fix, and pushed it for another Codex review cycle.

repo: The project uses `cargo insta` for snapshot testing; the correct syntax for filtering tests is `cargo insta test -p <crate> --unreferenced=reject -- <test_filter>` (filter goes after `--`, not before).
Codex review is triggered by posting `@codex review` as a PR comment and then polling for new unresolved review threads via the GitHub GraphQL API.
The project has a skill file at `.agents/skills/waiting-for-codex-review/SKILL.md` that documents the PR review loop workflow.
The combobox component lives in `crates/ars-components/src/selection/combobox/mod.rs` and has associated insta snapshots in `crates/ars-components/src/selection/combobox/snapshots/`.
Snapshots can be accepted with `cargo insta accept` or `cargo insta accept -p ars-components`.

code.finding: InlineCompletion live-region suffix was hard-coded English; now uses a localizable message hook.
Listbox was labelled with the trigger action text; changed to use `aria-labelledby` pointing at the field label id instead.
Snapshot changed from `aria-label` to `aria-labelledby` as an intentional result of the listbox labelling fix; snapshot was accepted.

workflow: The verification chain before committing is: `cargo fmt --check && cargo test -p <crate> <filter> && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo llvm-cov test --lib --no-fail-fast --text && git diff --check`.
Codex review threads are polled via GraphQL filtering for unresolved threads where the first comment author matches `codex` (case-insensitive).
After fixing a Codex thread, the workflow is: reply to the thread with the fix commit SHA, resolve the thread via GraphQL mutation, then post `@codex review` to trigger the next pass.
Commit co-authorship for Codex-driven fixes uses `Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>`.

friction: `cargo insta test` argument ordering gotcha: the test filter must come after `--`, not before; the chained verification command failed because the filter was placed incorrectly, requiring a rerun.
The RED test phase failed initially because the new localized message field didn't exist yet in the implementation, requiring a two-step patch (tests first, then implementation).
The test assertion expected the localized message without a trailing period, but the implementation included one, requiring a fixup to the assertion string.
open_items: PR #669 is still awaiting a clean Codex review pass after the latest push; the session ended before confirming no new findings.
CI unit tests were still pending at the time of the commit; results were not confirmed in the transcript.
Coverage numbers from `cargo llvm-cov` were generated but not analyzed or reported in the transcript.
